rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer law and motion calendar for Wednesday March 7, 2012 Line 1 DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A., CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to April 3, 2012 to be heard with other pending motions.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANN EBRIGHT VS. LATANYA MARIE SESSION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer law and motion calendar for Wednesday March 7, 2012 Line 2 -PLAINTIFF ANN EBRIGHT's Motion To Enforce Settlement. Deny- Court finds no settled agreement therefore not enforceable.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS VS. SOLOMON JONES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn Snf Mtn To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Stipulated Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer law and motion calendar for Wednesday March 7, 2012 Line 3 -PLAINTIFF PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Stipulated Agreement. Off calendar untimingly AND no dismissal on record AND ccp 473b not met. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF VS. RODOLFO G BEBING et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer law and motion calendar for Wednesday March 7, 2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANT CARMELITA ROTH, NEDDY BACHO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Res Judicata - Judge Busch found "Notice properly served and in a permissable form" see August 5, 2011 order. Counsel to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6c in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful detainer law and motion calendar for Wednesday March 7, 2012 Line 5 - DEFENDANT JAMES ELLIS' Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Memo To Set Matter For Trial. Deny no motion to strike on file. =(501/REQ)
